During annual state inspection on 7/8/22, tech found that the right rear wheel (19" VW Pretoria Gloss Black Alloy Wheels) was bent on both the inside and outside.  Unsafe to drive.  Wheel had to be replaced.  Do not recall hitting any pothole or road hazard that might have caused

narrative.headline: What 2019 Volkswagen Golf R owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 5 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Forward Collision Avoidance (20% of reports).
